Ãngel custodio mÃ­o, compaÃ±ero invisible desde el primer dÃ­a de mi vida, tÃº que conoces cada uno de mis pasos y has estado a mi lado en los momentos que no recuerdo y en los que sÃ­ â€” intercede hoy por mÃ­.

prayer.en:
Angel of God, my guardian dear, to whom His love commits me here: ever this day be at my side, to light and guard, to rule and guide. Amen.

My guardian angel, invisible companion since the first day of my life, you who know each of my steps and have been at my side in the moments I do not remember and in those I do â€” intercede for me today.

Protect me from the dangers of body and soul. When I do not see the danger, you see it. When I fall into darkness, you carry the light. When I sleep, you keep watch. When I pray, you present my prayer before God.

Guardian Angel, thank you for your faithful company. May I also learn to walk in the presence of God as you walk beside me.

Amen.

history.es:
El Angel de la Guarda es el guardian fiel que Dios asigno a cada alma desde su nacimiento: invisible pero real, silencioso pero presente, en cada cruce de caminos de la vida.

1. LA LIBERACION DE PEDRO DE LA PRISION (Hechos 12:1-17)
El rey Herodes Agripa habia encarcelado al apostol Pedro, encadenado entre dos soldados, con guardias en las puertas, decidido a ejecutarlo al dia siguiente. La comunidad cristiana oraba sin cesar. En medio de la noche, una luz resplandeciente lleno la celda y el angel del Senor golpeo a Pedro en el costado: «Levantate de prisa». Las cadenas cayeron de sus manos. El angel lo guio a traves de la primera y segunda guardia, hasta la puerta de hierro que da a la ciudad, que se abrio sola ante ellos. Salieron y recorrieron una calle entera. Entonces el angel desaparecio. Pedro, aun sin creer lo que vivia, dijo: «Ahora sé ciertamente que el Senor envio a su angel y me libro de la mano de Herodes». Esta es la liberacion angelical mas dramatica registrada en el Nuevo Testamento.

2. EL ANGEL EN GETSEMANI: FORTALECIENDO AL HIJO DE DIOS (Lucas 22:43)
En la noche mas oscura de la historia de la salvacion, Jesus oro en el huerto de Getsemani con una angustia tal que «su sudor se convirtio en como gotas de sangre que caian en tierra». El evangelista Lucas, medico, registra el fenomeno clinico del hematidrosis. En ese momento de ago­nia suprema, «se le aparecio un angel del cielo que lo fortalecia». El ser que sostuvo al Hijo de Dios en su hora mas humana era su guardian celestial: el angel que habia velado por Él desde la Anunciacion, el mismo que anuncio su nacimiento a los pastores, el que protegió al Nino en el viaje a Egipto. El Angel de la Guarda estuvo presente en el momento en que la Redencion de la humanidad se estaba consumando.

3. EL ANGEL DE SANTA GEMA GALGANI: CORREO MISTICO ENTRE EL CIELO Y LA TIERRA
La mistica italiana Gema Galgani (1878-1903) tenia una relacion extraordinaria y documentada con su angel guardian. Le dictaba cartas a su director espiritual, el Padre Germano Ruoppolo, a traves del angel cuando la distancia fisica lo impedia. El sacerdote recibio misivas escritas de puno y letra de Gema —verificadas caligrafica­mente— que llegaban a sus manos sin ningun mensajero fisico visible. En una ocasion, estando gravemente enferma, Gema le dijo a su angel: «Ve a decirle a Padre Germano que me traigan los sacramentos». El sacerdote, en Roma, sintio un impulso irresistible de viajar a Lucca esa misma noche. Llego justo a tiempo para administrarle la extremauncion. Cuando le pregunto como habia sabido, el respondi: «Una voz clara me llamo por mi nombre y me dijo: Corre a Lucca».
history.en:
The Guardian Angel is the faithful protector God assigns to every soul from birth: invisible but real, silent but present, at every crossroads of life.

1. THE LIBERATION OF PETER FROM PRISON (Acts 12:1-17)
King Herod Agrippa had imprisoned the apostle Peter, chained between two soldiers, with guards at the doors, determined to execute him the next day. The Christian community prayed without ceasing. In the middle of the night, a brilliant light filled the cell and the angel of the Lord struck Peter on the side: "Get up quickly." The chains fell from his hands. The angel led him through the first and second guard, to the iron gate leading to the city, which opened on its own before them. They went out and walked the length of a street. Then the angel disappeared. Peter, still not believing what he was experiencing, said: "Now I know for certain that the Lord sent his angel and rescued me from the hand of Herod." This is the most dramatic angelic liberation recorded in the New Testament.

2. THE ANGEL IN GETHSEMANE: STRENGTHENING THE SON OF GOD (Luke 22:43)
On the darkest night in the history of salvation, Jesus prayed in the Garden of Gethsemane with an anguish such that "his sweat became like drops of blood falling to the ground." The evangelist Luke, a physician, records the clinical phenomenon of hematidrosis. In that moment of supreme agony, "there appeared to him an angel from heaven, strengthening him." The being who sustained the Son of God in His most human hour was His heavenly guardian: the angel who had watched over Him since the Annunciation, the same one who announced His birth to the shepherds, who protected the Child on the flight to Egypt. The Guardian Angel was present at the very moment when the Redemption of humanity was being accomplished.

3. THE ANGEL OF SAINT GEMMA GALGANI: MYSTICAL COURIER BETWEEN HEAVEN AND EARTH
The Italian mystic Gemma Galgani (1878-1903) had an extraordinary, documented relationship with her guardian angel. She would dictate letters to her spiritual director, Father Germano Ruoppolo, through the angel when physical distance made it impossible. The priest received missives written in Gemma's own hand — graphologically verified — that arrived without any visible physical messenger. On one occasion, gravely ill, Gemma said to her angel: "Go tell Father Germano to bring me the Sacraments." The priest, in Rome, felt an irresistible urge to travel to Lucca that very night. He arrived just in time to administer the Last Rites. When asked how he had known, he replied: "A clear voice called me by name and said: Run to Lucca."

novena.en:
Day 1 â€” My Invisible Companion

Guardian Angel, companion of my whole life, who are at my side since the day I was born though I do not always remember it: today I want to acknowledge your presence and thank you for your faithfulness. Intercede before God for me and help me to walk today with greater awareness of His presence.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 2 â€” La ProtecciÃ³n

Ãngel custodio, que me proteges de los peligros que no veo: intercede para que Dios me libre de todo mal, tanto del cuerpo como del alma. Que en los momentos de peligro yo sienta tu presencia y confÃ­e en la providencia de Dios.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 2 â€” Protection

Guardian Angel, who protect me from dangers I cannot see: intercede that God may deliver me from all evil, both of body and of soul. May I feel your presence in moments of danger and trust in God's providence.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 3 â€” La GuÃ­a

Ãngel de la Guarda, que me guÃ­as hacia Dios y me apartas del mal: ilumina mi mente en las decisiones difÃ­ciles. Que cuando estÃ© confundido sobre el camino a seguir, perciba tu luz y tu direcciÃ³n.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 3 â€” Guidance

Guardian Angel, who guide me toward God and turn me away from evil: illuminate my mind in difficult decisions. When I am confused about which path to take, may I perceive your light and your direction.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 4 â€” Los NiÃ±os

Ãngel custodio, que JesÃºs prometiÃ³ a los niÃ±os diciÃ©ndoles que sus Ã¡ngeles siempre ven el rostro del Padre: intercede especialmente por todos los niÃ±os del mundo, por los que sufren, los abandonados y los que estÃ¡n en peligro. Que ninguno de los pequeÃ±os perezca.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 4 â€” Children

Guardian Angel, whom Jesus promised to children by saying that their angels always see the face of the Father: intercede especially for all children in the world, for those who suffer, the abandoned, and those in danger. May none of the little ones perish.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 5 â€” La OraciÃ³n

Ãngel de la Guarda, que presentas mis oraciones ante Dios: intercede para que yo aprenda a orar con mÃ¡s fidelidad y mÃ¡s amor. Que mi oraciÃ³n no sea solo rutina, sino un verdadero diÃ¡logo con Dios en el que escuche, adore, agradezca y pida.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 5 â€” Prayer

Guardian Angel, who present my prayers before God: intercede that I may learn to pray with more fidelity and love. May my prayer not be mere routine, but a true dialogue with God in which I listen, adore, give thanks, and ask.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 6 â€” La Hora de la Muerte

Ãngel custodio, que estarÃ¡s a mi lado en la hora de mi muerte: intercede para que en ese momento no me encuentre desprevenido. Que viva cada dÃ­a como si fuera el Ãºltimo, en paz con Dios y con mis hermanos, listo para encontrarme con el SeÃ±or.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 6 â€” The Hour of Death

Guardian Angel, who will be at my side at the hour of my death: intercede that in that moment I may not be found unprepared. May I live each day as if it were my last, at peace with God and with my brothers and sisters, ready to meet the Lord.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 7 â€” Los Viajeros

Ãngel de la Guarda, protector de los viajeros: intercede por todos los que estÃ¡n de camino hoy â€” en automÃ³vil, aviÃ³n, barco o a pie. Que lleguen a salvo a su destino y que cada viaje sea una oportunidad de encontrar a Dios en el camino.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 7 â€” Travelers

Guardian Angel, protector of travelers: intercede for all who are on a journey today â€” by car, airplane, ship, or on foot. May they arrive safely at their destination and may each journey be an opportunity to encounter God along the way.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 8 â€” La Gratitud

Ãngel custodio, hoy quiero detenerte para agradecerte. CuÃ¡ntas veces me has protegido sin que yo lo supiera. CuÃ¡ntas veces has intercedido por mÃ­ en el silencio. CuÃ¡ntas veces me has inspirado a hacer el bien o a evitar el mal. Gracias, Ã¡ngel de Dios.

novena.en:
Day 8 â€” Gratitude

Guardian Angel, today I want to pause and thank you. How many times have you protected me without my knowing it. How many times have you interceded for me in silence. How many times have you inspired me to do good or to avoid evil. Thank you, angel of God.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 9 â€” El Camino al Cielo

Ãngel de la Guarda, al concluir esta novena te pido que no me dejes solo en el camino hacia Dios. Que yo viva con conciencia de tu presencia, que hable contigo, que escuche tus inspiraciones y que un dÃ­a llegues a presentarme ante el trono de Dios.

Â¡Ãngel de la Guarda, compaÃ±ero fiel, intercede por nosotros!

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 9 â€” The Path to Heaven

Guardian Angel, as I conclude this novena I ask you not to leave me alone on the path to God. May I live with awareness of your presence, may I speak with you, listen to your inspirations, and one day may you present me before the throne of God.

Guardian Angel, faithful companion, intercede for us!

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.
